title: 为啥越来越多的公司发现AI不能替代人工？
content: Companies that rushed to replace workers with AI are now reversing course. Surveys show 55% of executives who cut staff for AI regret it, while Ford rehired engineers and Australia's Commonwealth Bank restored human客服 after AI systems failed. AI requires ongoing human oversight, data refinement, and error correction to function; without the institutional knowledge of experienced staff, output accuracy degrades. AI struggles with nuanced judgment, empathy, and non-standard scenarios that define competitive advantage. Rising API, computing, and maintenance costs often exceed savings from eliminating mid-level employees. The optimal role for AI is augmenting human workers rather than replacing them.
eventKey: 为啥越来越多的公司发现ai不能替代人工
normalizedTitle: 为啥越来越多的公司发现ai不能替代人工

title: GT AI Gateway 支持本地 Agent 配置了
content: GT AI Gateway adds local client management, allowing centralized configuration of Claude Codex and other clients directly through the gateway instead of manual local setup. It automatically handles protocol conversion between formats like Anthropic and OpenAI. The update also adds proxy support for providers and code optimizations. GT AI Gateway is a lightweight AI API gateway for aggregating and managing multiple LLM APIs with features including request analysis, protocol conversion, user authentication, full logging, and multiple deployment modes.

title: “背后空无一人”的LV，这次中国人彻底不买账了
content: LV faces backlash in China after suing milk-tea chain Molly Tea for $1.03 million over a four-leaf clover design. Chinese consumers discovered LV's iconic monogram derives from traditional Chinese patterns like the Sui-Tang baoxiang flower, fueling accusations of cultural appropriation. Meanwhile, LV's aggressive litigation—1,691 trademark cases in five years—coincides with declining sales: 2025 revenue fell 5%, profits dropped 13%, with its worst quarter in 30 years triggered by China. Young Chinese reject price hikes, preferring affordable domestic brands. Expanding stores to third-tier cities eroded the scarcity middle-class buyers valued. Competitors like Celine and Miu Miu captured fleeing customers with fresher designs.
eventKey: “背后空无一人”的lv-这次中国人彻底不买账了

title: 阿里急转向，快递大变局
content: Alibaba is strategically retreating from its logistics investments while consolidating control over core e-commerce operations. The company has been reducing holdings in major couriers like YTO Express, ZTO, Yunda, and fully divesting from Best Express. Meanwhile, Cainiao's domestic supply chain unit is being absorbed into Taobao-Tmall Group to strengthen instant retail capabilities. Despite the pullback, Alibaba maintains deepest ties with STO Express through extended purchase options, keeping potential control until 2028. The shift reflects shrinking courier profit margins, industry overcapacity, and Alibaba's focus on higher-growth overseas logistics and AI+cloud priorities over capital-intensive delivery networks.

normalizedTitle: 阿里急转向 快递大变局

title: 腾讯重仓一个IPO
content: Shenzhen-based Yuebao Intelligent (云豹智能), founded in 2020 by Stanford PhD Hsiao Qi-Yang, has filed for a ChiNext IPO to become China's first listed domestic DPU company. The firm develops high-performance data processing unit chips, with revenue surging to 370 million yuan in 2025 but still reporting net losses. Tencent is the largest shareholder with 19.78% stake after multiple funding rounds. The IPO follows fellow Greater Bay Area semiconductor firm Yuexin Semiconductor's successful listing approval, highlighting ChiNext's revised standards enabling unprofitable hard-tech companies to go public based on R&D and growth potential.

title: 锂电池行业更新7-11（多头崩溃）
content: The lithium battery sector experienced a severe decline, with analysts revising 2025 global battery shipment estimates upward from 2,600-2,800 GWh to 2,900-3,100 GWh, still below the projected 3,200-3,300 GWh actual figure. Detailed supply-demand analysis shows 2026 lithium carbonate supply at 205-210 million tons versus demand of 224 million tons, requiring full depletion of hidden inventories and reduction of visible inventories to 6-80,000 tons. For 2027, even conservative scenarios project 2350 GWh power batteries and 1600 GWh storage, totaling 4110 GWh and requiring approximately 275 million tons of lithium carbonate. With supply estimated at 260-280 million tons, the market faces persistent structural deficits rather than oversupply. Storage battery orders already extend 6-9 months, indicating strong demand. Market pessimism stems from

title: 全网骂Claude变笨，Anthropic下场揭秘：坑你的不是模型
content: Anthropic clarified that Claude Code users often confuse Model selection with Effort settings. In March, lowering the default Effort from high to medium caused widespread complaints that Claude had "gotten dumber"—with task completion dropping 67%—though users blamed model degradation. Model determines capability ("brain"), while Effort determines thoroughness ("attitude"): reading files, running tests, verifying results. High Effort can make smaller models outperform larger ones on low Effort. Anthropic recommends checking context first, then deciding whether failures stem from insufficient capability (upgrade model) or insufficient effort (increase Effort). Effective AI programming now requires strategically scheduling models and effort levels rather than simply choosing the largest model.
eventKey: 全网骂claude变笨-anthropic下场揭秘-坑你的不是模型

title: AI批量造App，也在批量埋雷
content: AI-powered app creation tools like Moltbook and Lovable enable non-coders to build software rapidly, but security researchers discovered critical vulnerabilities exposing millions of API tokens, emails, and private messages due to misconfigured databases and authorization flaws. While these tools eliminate coding barriers, they do not address security responsibilities. A survey found ~5000 publicly accessible AI-generated apps leaking sensitive data, as privacy defaults often favor public access. Platforms marketing "zero-barrier" development deflect accountability by blaming users rather than implementing protective defaults. True developer competence now requires engineering responsibility: understanding data sensitivity, designing permissions, and maintaining safe deployment.

title: 这个周末，科技投资人都得飞一趟成都
content:
Chengdu is emerging as a key hub for new energy investment. Four partners—including Chengdu state-owned platforms and Hangzhou-based Bicheng Energy—are launching a 1 billion yuan new energy M&A fund in Pengzhou city. The collaboration focuses on solar, energy storage, integrated charging systems, and urban microgrids, while establishing a smart energy management platform.

The partnership signals a shift in new energy asset operations: REITs and securitization tools are transforming previously illiquid infrastructure into tradable financial products. Chengdu attracts this investment through dual advantages: systematic capital deployment via local government funds and genuinely open application scenarios including industrial rooftops and urban microgrid opportunities.

title: 近百名玩家涌入具身数据 : 一年融资44.7亿，谁能真靠“卖数据”赚钱？
content: China's embodied intelligence data industry has attracted nearly 100 players, with 15 independent data service providers raising 4.47 billion yuan in the past year. Four main data collection approaches exist: real-device teleoperation, body-free capture, simulation, and internet video distillation. Cross-route strategies dominate, yet no single method meets all robot training needs. Annual industry capacity stands at 1.6-1.8 million hours, targeting 15-20x growth. Despite becoming an independent sector creating jobs and regional economic activity, the field remains early-stage: most companies are under one year old, nearly all at pre-A funding rounds, and none have proven profitability. Major investors remain cautious, with no institution making heavy bets.
eventKey: 近百名玩家涌入具身数据-一年融资44-谁能真靠“卖数据”赚钱
normalizedTitle: 近百名玩家涌入具身数据 一年融资44 7亿 谁能真靠“卖数据”赚钱

title: 股价破千背后的虚火，沐曦股份离盈亏平衡还有多远？
content: Mushi Co. (沐曦股份) reached a 400 billion RMB market cap in July 2026 after its stock briefly exceeded 1,000 RMB, but fundamentals remain weak. The company posted 1.64 billion RMB revenue in 2025 (up 121%) yet net losses of 789 million RMB, with cumulative unrecovered losses hitting 1.55 billion RMB. Q1 2026 still showed 99 million RMB losses. Despite strong GPU sales growth, massive R&D spending (1.03 billion RMB annually, 62% of revenue), negative operating cash flows, and high inventory and receivables risks threaten profitability. Mushi lags behind competitors like Huawei, Cambricon, and Hygon in securing major internet company orders and large-scale cluster deployments. Its 400-billion valuation lacks profit support, with price-to-book ratio over 30x versus industry averages. As domestic

title: 智谱，害怕成为下一个MiniMax
content: Zhipu AI founder Tang Jie issued a 4,000-word internal letter titled "The Giant Wave Has Arrived" shortly after competitor MiniMax's stock crashed post-lockup expiry. While Zhipu's coding-focused strategy drove its valuation to over one trillion HKD, Tang deliberately avoided celebrating this success. Instead, he emphasized autonomous agents, self-evolving AI, and AGI—technologies with no near-term revenue potential. Tang aims to prevent investors from applying SaaS valuation metrics to Zhipu, which devastated MiniMax when markets shifted to measuring ARR and user retention. By pivoting narratives before commercialization, Tang seeks to maintain "AGI company" pricing premium over "coding tool" multiples.
eventKey: 害怕成为下一个minimax
normalizedTitle: 智谱 害怕成为下一个minimax

title: 对话SK海力士崔泰源：AI时代的存储变局与展望
content: SK Hynix Chairman Chey Tae-won discussed the company's historic NYSE ADR listing, noting AI-driven exponential memory demand has structurally transformed the industry. Unlike past cycles tied to consumer electronics and population size, AI inference requires unlimited memory for KV caching, with customers wanting 5–6× capacity expansion despite planned doubling. Chey sees supply unable to catch demand until AGI integration occurs. He emphasized HBM, NAND for cold data, and future "Memory-as-a-Service" models. SK plans massive AI data center investments (15GW domestic, 5GW abroad) and broader AI stack development including robotics and healthcare, while acknowledging Chinese AI strategies focused on cost-efficient token production.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 景云鹏CapitalAI
eventKey: 对话sk海力士崔泰源-ai时代的存储变局与展望
